prose:
Method provenance
Property: Frontier molecular orbital energies and HOMO–LUMO gap (electron-volt)
Level of theory: DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, RI) in PySCF
Geometry provenance: user-supplied tempo.xyz; single-point only (no re-optimization)
Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvation)
Charge & multiplicity: charge 0, multiplicity 2 (doublet, UKS)
Software: PySCF 2.x via chemkit frontier-orbitals skill
Convergence & caveats: SCF converged in 12 cycles; no warnings reported; density-fitting (RI) approximation active by default.

Computed frontier-orbital energies (eV):
  HOMO  = –6.3375439
  LUMO  = –2.4651235
  HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203 eV  (headline value reported above)

Files & reproducibility: calculation executed via
`chemkit frontier-orbitals --method dft --tier standard --mult 2 tempo.xyz`  
Live PySCF log streamed during run (path was shown at start); result JSON recorded to the working directory with full details, including the SCF history.

No experimental comparison was requested. Result is a computed UKS orbital gap at B3LYP/def2-TZVP and should not be taken as an excitation energy.
